title: The Flint Beginning
description: No tree punching, begin your journey with flint!
body:
![Primitive Start Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc35c2f58a854338b66ce1af41e82e72415f8270.png)
 
Tired of punching trees? The **PrimalCraft: The Flint Beginning** module reimagines Minecraft’s early game into a tougher, more realistic survival experience. Say goodbye to wooden tools and unbreakable fists.


<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>
  
![Knife Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9de677130765f330fdbae29246379123687b30c.png)

![Axe Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83d2b93898f6e31acada6b502318b26dcf956700.png)

![Pickaxe Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e04442144a80a629683668f9b8cf3af4d7b6529.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>More about The Flint Beginning</summary>
  
### 🧔‍♂️ Primitive Progression
- **Find Flint & Sticks** – Gather Flint from gravel and Sticks from fallen leaves.
- **Craft the Flint Knife** – Your first essential tool.
- **Collect Grass Fiber** – Use the knife on tall grass to get this new crafting material.
- **Make the Primitive Axe** – Combine Flint, Fiber, and Sticks to finally chop down your first tree.

### 🚫 No More Tree Punching — Your Hands Have Limits
Your fists are no longer indestructible. Wooden tools are gone, and brute-forcing nature has consequences.

- **No Wooden Tools** – Removed from crafting, creative inventory, and bonus chests.
- **Breaking Hard Blocks Hurts** – Attempting to break logs, stone, ores, or other solid blocks by hand now inflicts **half a heart of damage** per hit.
- **Extreme Fatigue** – Using non-tools (like seeds or dirt) to break solid blocks won’t hurt you but is **100× slower**.
- **Fragile but Dangerous** – Punching **glass or ice** will cause damage. They’ll still shatter, but you **won’t get the block back**.

</details>

**Requires Fabric API:** [📦 Fabric API — Modrinth Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
